data.title:
"Let me know when a significant company buys Bitcoin"

People forget Tesla and SpaceX hold Bitcoin.
GameStop (GME) Stock Falls Following $1,300,000,000 Bitcoin (BTC) Announcement
data.description:
GameStop (GME) shares are returning to normal levels today following an initial rally on the announcement of fundraising plans to buy Bitcoin (BTC). Yesterday, GameStop announced a proposed private offering of $1. 3 billion in convertible senior notes with plans to use the funds to purchase the crypto king
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/03/27/gamestop-gme-stock-falls-following-1300000000-bitcoin-btc-announcement/

data.title: Senator John Kennedy grills SEC nominee Paul Atkins about SBF pardon
data.description:
US Senator John Kennedy grilled prospective Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) chairman Paul Atkins about a potential pardon for Sam “SBF” Bankman-Fried during the Senate Banking Committee’s March 27 nomination hearing. The Louisiana Republican directed a series of questions about the former FTX CEO toward Atkins and probed the prospective SEC chairman about donations Bankman-Fried’s family made to Stanford University. Senator John Kennedy questions prospective SEC chairman Paul Atkins
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/senator-john-kennedy-grills-paul-atkins-sbf-pardon?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: The Strategy Effect: How Much Bitcoin Did Corporates Buy This Week?
data.description:
This week five companies together bought 7697. 3 Bitcoins worth $670 million.
source: https://blockchainlab.co.in/how-much-bitcoin-did-corporates-buy-this-week/

data.title: Dogecoin Set For 10x Surge? Elon Musk’s Anime X Post Sparks Hype
data.description:
Dogecoin’s price is showing signs of a potential big jump, according to recent market analysis. The cryptocurrency, known for its Shiba Inu dog mascot, saw a 14% increase in its value over the past week. Traders are watching closely as it approaches a key resistance level of $0. 20
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/meme-coins/dogecoin-set-for-10x-surge-elon-musks-anime-x-post-sparks-hype/

data.title: US Justice Department seizes over $200K in cryptocurrency intended for terrorism financing
data.description:
The US Department of Justice announced the disruption of a crypto donation scheme, using a series of wallets raising funds through encrypted chats.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/us-justice-department-seizes-over-200k-in-cryptocurrency-intended-for-terrorism-financing/

data.title: BNB Surpasses 640 USDT with a 3.27% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 27, 2025, 18:35 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 640 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 640.169983 USDT, with a narrowed 3.27% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: DOJ seizes $200k in crypto tied to Hamas terrorists
data.description:
DOJ seizes $201K in crypto tied to Hamas, disrupting a $1. 5M terror financing network traced to wallets across Turkey and beyond.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/doj-seizes-200k-in-crypto-tied-to-hamas-terrorists-

data.title: Bitcoin Investors Love The Possibility of US Government Investing In Crypto. For Trump, Lots of Talk, But No Action Yet.
data.description:
Trump signs an order to create a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve. But the U. S. government is still not a buyer. Treasury Secretary says that might change. 
source: https://www.benzinga.com/markets/cryptocurrency/25/03/44521724/bitcoin-investors-love-the-possibility-of-us-government-investing-in-crypto-for-trump-lots?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: 3 reasons why Bitcoin price can’t take out the $90K resistance level
data.description:
Since reaching a weekly high of $88,752 on March 24, Bitcoin (BTC) price has formed a series of lower highs and lower lows in the 1-hour time frame chart. As the end of the week approaches, Bitcoin price has failed to break above the $88,000 resistance, reducing the chance for a $90,000 retest before the end of Q1. Bitcoin 1-hour chart
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/3-reasons-why-bitcoin-price-can-t-take-out-the-90-k-resistance-level?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
